The belongings of the Toringas and their allies can be found throughout Tordag's camp, north of the road between Torsbury and Stoke. Thane Torferth as…
Thane Torferth is in Tordag's camp, north of the road between Torsbury and Stoke. You should bring the evidence you found to Torferth for his review.
